title: Copper Country Furry Forge
description: Copper Country Furry Forge - A small Create centered kitchen sink pack!
body:
# Copper Country: Furry Forge 🦊

**Copper Country Furry Forge** is a Create mod centered kitchen-sink modpack, packed with numerous Create mod addons and additions to bring to life the industrial side of Minecraft. CCFF also comes with some extended end progression that gives extra depth to Minecraft's end-game stages.

## Full Steam Ahead! ⚙️

This pack brings Minecraft straight into the industrial age with Create mod and its companion mods and additions, along with more technological mods such as AE2 and EnderIO you can make your world into the techno-speampunk industrial paradise it was destined to be.

![Use code 'Empire' for 25% off your minecraft server!](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/8b44796c-5f66-4ed7-88bb-ff86b92e1ec7.webp)

## Extended End Progression?? 

Getting to the end will be slightly more difficult, the biggest change being a new recipe for obtaining Eyes of Ender.

![New Eye of Ender Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db0f339a7168bd4ff914824aa220251e9ea005e2.png)

## Main Content Mods
- Create 6
- Create: The Factory Must Grow
- Create: New Age
- Ender IO
- Tinkers Construct
- Farmers Delight
- Applied Energistics 2
- More to come!

## Future Updates
We are constantly working to improve the experience of **CCFF**, so be on the lookout for new content and feature updates!

**Made with 💛 by Aleph and PhantomStray**
